rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CHRISTINE YOUNG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues have not been cleared: (1) Letters have not been issued. (2) A written and verified report of the estate bank account has not been filed. (3) Petition for final distribution and final report has not been filed. If such a petition cannot be filed at this time, a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. Code sec. 12200 et seq. two weeks before the hearing. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BARBARA MOLLER LYONS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/5/25. Examiner's Notes sent to attorney with the following issues: 1) Not addressed from prior Examiner's Notes: Ending balance of cash (showing the end of account date) must be verified [Local Rule 14.34D]. Please also make sure to file a verified declaration pursuant to Local Rule 14.59A certifying that the original document(s) will be available for inspection in the same way as documents are maintained under CRC 2.257. 2) Petitioner requests that ~$78,750 be added to the requested reserve (the difference between the initially requested and corrected amount of extraordinary fees). Please allege why this much more in reserve is needed. If not needed, they must be added to the requested distribution. A revised order should also be submitted.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FELICE TSAI
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/5/25 to address Examiner's Notes sent to counsel on 3/24/25 with the following issues: 1) Satisfaction and release must be filed by the 3 creditors who petitioner alleges have all been paid. 2) Please specify the assets on hand and the as of date (e.g. as of 1/1/25: total cash of $100,000, 100 shares of XYZ stock, 50 shares of ABS stock, etc). 3) Please calculate the cash to be distributed (e.g. $10,000 cash on hand, less $5,000 fees, less $1,000 costs = $4,000 cash on hand to distribute). 4) Please specify what each beneficiary will receive (John Doe: $100 cash, 5 shares of ABC stock, 5 share of XYZ stock, etc.) 5) Please allege whether any actions were taken under the IAEA and, if so, whether proper Notice of Proposed Action were sent. 6) Please allege whether any assets were sold, and if so, whether there were any losses on sale (which losses, if any, must be reflected in the statutory fee base). Please submit a revised proposed order to correct the above. All documents to be filed by 4/23/25. NOTE: the declaration filed on 3/25/25 has not been reviewed as it was not verified by the personal representative.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF TAI BING CHIU
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Court Approval Of Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Issues to be addressed at hearing: 1) Notice was not given to conservatee (Probate Code Section 1460(b)(2). 2) Proof of service indicates that notice was given on March 23, 2025, but the petition was not filed until March 24, 2025, just 14 days prior to the hearing (San Francisco Local Rule 14.14.A). 3) The petition to approve settlement does not satisfy the requirements set forth in San Francisco Local Rule 14.43.D. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF BARBARA BROWN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Status Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/5/2025. Proof of Service of the mailing of the GC-340 (order) and GC-341 (notice of conservatee's right) was mailed by the conservator herself. Proof of service must shows a third person mailed the documents. This issue must be cleared before 4/28/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE IN THE MATTER OF THE BYPASS TRUST U/T/O THE 1993 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Compelling The Trustee Regarding Allocation Of Trustee'S Fees, Attorneys' Fees, Accountants' Fees And Investment Advisory Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Court to determine whether venue in San Francisco is proper. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE PAMELA ROBBINS 2019 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset Under Probate Code 17200(B)(4), 850(A)(3), & 856
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/12/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Neither trustee resides in San Francisco. How is this the proper venue? (The residence of the deceased settlor is not determinative.) (2) When did Lawrence Alan Robbins and Nick Varkelos die? (3) Was the brother not survived by issue? (4) How are the three named cousins the nearest heirs? [See LRSF 14.18 C. and D.] NB: Probate Code Section 850 is a shortcut for a formal estate administration. Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 4/28/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE SATTLEY AND ROSIE MCGEE FAMILY TRUST DATED
rulings.Calendar Matter: 1. Compelling Current Trustees To Turn Over Documents And Information; 2. Suspension Of Respondents As Co-Trustees; 3. Removal Of Respondents As
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/21/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been lodged or received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of the petition and any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 5/7/25. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DAVID LARSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/28/25. Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) The Acknowledgment of Receipt of the Duties and Liabilities is incomplete. All proposed executors must sign (and date) and provide their information. (2) The Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required (for each proposed executor), pursuant to Probate Code Section 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially with a cover sheet. Please provide courtesy copies of the petition and any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 4/14/25. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Rulings: Hearing to admit the will. No appearance required. Status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for 05/04/2026.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: DUC VAN LUU
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Court to determine on the petition. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
